'''Venutton''' was a scrawny, uptight [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] assistant to the [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphid]] crimelord, [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Valarian/Legends|Valarian]].<ref name="OF" /> He was the manager of the [[Lucky Despot]].<ref name="GG7" />
